nasb.text: So Moses and Eleazar the priest took the gold from the captains of thousands and of hundreds, and brought it to the tent of meeting as a memorial for the sons of Israel before the Lord.

esv.text: And Moses and Eleazar the priest received the gold from the commanders of thousands and of hundreds, and brought it into the tent of meeting, as a memorial for the people of Israel before the Lord.

cnv.text: 摩西和以利亞撒祭司就從千夫長和百夫長手中收了金子，把它帶進會幕裡去，在耶和華面前作以色列人的記念。

ccb.text: 摩西和以利亚撒祭司就把千夫长和百夫长献的金子带进会幕，在耶和华面前作以色列人的纪念。
